title: gowin: -nolutram needed for simple initialised memory read/write module, otherwise  spurious writes corrupt values on startup

features.name: unpacked_array_memory_with_readmemh_initialization
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory declaration with $readmemh initialization

features.name: synchronous_memory_read_write_in_same_always_block
features.description: Code should include conditional read and write operations on memory inside a clocked always block
